project_type: Java CDK project - Event-driven Sleep Audio Processing Pipeline on AWS
build_system: Maven 3.9.10 with aws-cdk-lib dependency. Requires proxy settings in ~/.m2/settings.xml for network access. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for cdk synth.
test_framework: JUnit 5 with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack, Match, hasResourceProperties). Tests parse state machine DefinitionString JSON to validate Step Functions flow.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'mvn test' - all tests must pass. 2. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth' - must produce valid CloudFormation template without errors.
setup_instructions: Maven proxy is already configured in ~/.m2/settings.xml. Java 25 and Maven 3.9.10 available via mise. Node.js v22 available via nvm. CDK synth requires NODE_OPTIONS='' to avoid proxy bootstrap module error.
environment_constraints: Network is proxied through an ELB proxy. Maven Central accessible only through proxy (already configured). NODE_OPTIONS env var must be cleared when running Node.js/CDK commands. No Docker available for container builds.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: tests before implementation. Conventional commits (feat/fix/chore/docs/refactor). ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram must stay in sync with code. All infrastructure must have assertion tests.
key_patterns: Single CdkBaseStack with all resources. Template.fromStack for CDK assertions. ObjectMapper parsing of state machine DefinitionString for flow validation. Match.objectLike/arrayWith for property assertions. Environment tag applied via CDK context.
directory_structure: Root: pom.xml, cdk.json, README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, LICENSE, mise.toml. src/main/java/com/myorg/ has CdkBaseApp.java, CdkBaseStack.java, PipelineStack.java. src/main/resources/lambda/audio-processor/index.py has the Python Lambda. src/test/java/com/myorg/ has 14 test files. .github/ has AGENT_GUIDELINES.md and workflows/ci.yml.
